# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the documentation change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Governance
- [ ] Roadmap
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Standards
- [ ] ADR
- [ ] Volume content
- [ ] Diagram
- [ ] GitHub community file

## Required Reading

- [ ] I read `docs/MASTER_CONTEXT.md`.
- [ ] I read `docs/ROADMAP.md`.
- [ ] I read `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`.
- [ ] I followed `docs/CONSTITUTION.md`.
- [ ] I followed `docs/STANDARDS.md`.

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Terminology matches `docs/GLOSSARY.md`.
- [ ] Cross-references are valid.
- [ ] Relevant diagrams are updated or confirmed unchanged.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated when the change is notable.
- [ ] `docs/MASTER_CONTEXT.md` is updated when status or scope changes.
- [ ] `docs/ROADMAP.md` is updated when sequencing or exit criteria change.
- [ ] ADRs are added or updated for material decisions.
- [ ] No placeholder content, filler, or unsupported claims are introduced.

## Follow-Up Work

List follow-up work that should be tracked separately.
